ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university attended by the player */,
  "born" INTEGER /* Year the player was born */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City where the player was born */,
  "birth_state" TEXT /* State where the player was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  " draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team affiliation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" INTEGER /* Value of the contract in millions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "champion" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "player_season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "player_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_star_game_stats" (
  "all_star_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each All-Star game performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the All-Star game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_star_game_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff series */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the series */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the series */,
  "series_wins" INTEGER /* Number of series wins */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_playoff_stats" (
  "player_playoff_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-playoff performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playoff series */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_playoff_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_pick_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the trade */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "free_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player signed with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g. knee, ankle) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g. minor, major) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coach" (
  "player_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-coach relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player-coach relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player-coach relationship ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_coach_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_coach_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
